subcodes.first_line: O Mother! I write unto thee in the Persian tongue, that thou mayest hear the sweet melody of the Divine Bird from this utterance [3.5s]... ...Say: O friend! Sleep with your face turned to the Friend... Know thou, therefore, that in every age and dispensation all Divine Ordinances are changed and transformed according to the requirements of the time, except the law of love
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مادر نوشته تو را بزبان پارسی مینویسم تا شیرین زبانی طیر الهی را از لسان
subcodes.subjects: @love as fundamental; spiritual foundations of religion, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @changing and unchanging parts of religion, @love of God, @spiritual transformation
